business.name: Elite Plumbing
business.serviceArea: Bainbridge Island & North Seattle — Ballard, Magnolia, Queen Anne, Fremont, Wallingford, Phinney Ridge, Green Lake
business.about: A licensed master plumbing studio serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. Emergency response, drain clearing, water heater replacement, and remodel rough-in done properly — permit pulled, inspection passed, no gray-area work.

services.name: Emergency Repair
services.description: Burst pipe, major leak, sewage backup, or no hot water. Licensed plumber on-site the same day for active emergencies. Flat-rate diagnosis before a wrench turns.

services.name: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Camera inspection, auger clearing, and hydro-jetting for kitchen sinks, bath drains, floor drains, and main sewer lines. We find the actual cause, not just clear the symptom.

services.name: Water Heater Replacement
services.description: Tank and tankless water heater replacement — gas, electric, and heat-pump hybrid. Permit pulled, expansion tank installed where code requires, old unit hauled. Same-day service when units are in stock.

services.name: Remodel Rough-In
services.description: New construction and remodel rough-in plumbing for kitchens, bathrooms, laundry rooms, and ADUs. Permit pulled, plans reviewed, inspections managed start to finish.

services.name: Fixture Installation
services.description: Faucet, toilet, shower valve, garbage disposal, and supply line replacement. Supply lines shut off, fixture installed to manufacturer spec, water pressure verified before leaving.

services.name: Sewer & Drain Line
services.description: Camera diagnostic, trenchless lining, and full line replacement for cast iron, clay tile, and Orangeburg sewer lines. Permit pulled, engineering review for large jobs, work guaranteed.

testimonials.name: Tom B.
testimonials.text: Burst pipe under the kitchen sink at 11pm. Called the emergency line and had a plumber at the door by 8am with the right parts. Fixed in two hours — no water damage because they moved fast.

testimonials.name: Rachel M.
testimonials.text: Water heater failed on a Thursday. They had a replacement unit installed the same afternoon. Pulled the permit, installed the expansion tank they said was missing. Everything done right.

testimonials.name: Kevin L.
testimonials.text: Camera inspection found tree root intrusion in the sewer line that explained years of slow drains. Trenchless liner instead of full excavation saved us thousands. No surprises on price.

testimonials.name: Amy P.
testimonials.text: Bathroom remodel rough-in. They coordinated with our general contractor, pulled the permit, and passed inspection first visit. That's not always how it goes.

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: On-site within 24 hours — same-day for active leaks. Licensed plumber assesses the actual issue, explains it, and quotes in writing before any work starts.

process.title: Permit
process.description: Every job that requires a permit gets one. We pull it, schedule the inspection, and pass it before we close the job. The permit is proof the work is safe and code-compliant.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Licensed master plumber on every job. Quality parts, proper connections, and a clean job site every day. No temporary fixes called permanent, no shortcuts on supply or drain line specs.

process.title: Guarantee
process.description: One-year workmanship warranty on all installations. Emergency line active after hours for anything that comes up. We stand behind the work.

chatbot.greeting: Hi — Elite Plumbing's coordinator. Emergency, repair, or a new install? I'll get you sorted fast.
qualifyingQuestions: Is this an emergency — active leak, burst pipe, or sewage backup?
If it's a repair, roughly where is the issue — kitchen, bathroom, or main line?
Is your water shut off right now?
chatbot.customInstructions: Lead with urgency for any active leak, no-heat, or sewage backup — these are emergencies. Anchor on licensed master plumber credentials, permit management, and flat-rate diagnosis. Reference camera inspection capability for drain issues. Emergency-first tone for anything that sounds like water damage risk.

persona.name: Olivia
persona.title: Service Coordinator
persona.proactiveBubbleText: Hi — plumbing emergency, repair, or new install? I can help right now.

faqs.question: Do you handle plumbing emergencies?
faqs.answer: Yes — active leaks, burst pipes, and sewage backup. Same-day service, $195 service call.

faqs.question: Do you install water heaters?
faqs.answer: Yes — tank and tankless, gas and electric. Same-day service when units are in stock.

faqs.question: Do you do camera inspections?
faqs.answer: Yes — camera inspection for drain and sewer line diagnosis before recommending repair or replacement.

faqs.question: Do you pull permits?
faqs.answer: Yes — every job that requires a permit gets one, handled start to finish.
